subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-03-09 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: [He remarked that] it would certainly come to pass, and that it will be close at hand when the peoples of the world have been provoked to cry out
subcodes.first_line_orig: البته وقتی میآید و نزدیک است که ملل عالم بفریاد آیند و مصارف باهظهٴ حرب را تحمل نتوانند
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @principle of balance; moderation; equilibrium
